details.name: Night King
details.name_lang: {"en":"Night King","zh_hk":"氓陇聹莽聨聥"}
details.title: Night King
details.title_lang: {"en":"Night King","zh_hk":"氓陇聹莽聨聥"}
details.description:
The year is 2012. The once-glamourous Club EJ suddenly experiences a hostile takeover. Much like the nightclub industry, the glory days are over for the club芒聙聶s manager, Foon (Dayo Wong), despite having stood tall in East Tsim Sha Tsui for decades.

To make things worse for Foon, the club芒聙聶s new CEO is none other than his cutthroat ex-wife, Madame V (Sammi Cheng)! Determined to change things up, she leaves Foon and his hostesses with no choice but to transform and modernize in order to breathe new life into their business. Little do they know, a powerful conglomerate has been pulling the strings all along to shut down Club EJ for good.

To save their neon empire, Foon and V must join forces and make an epic last stand with the hostesses against what seems to be inevitable doom.
details.subtitle: Chinese,English
details.subtitle_lang: {"en":"Chinese,English","zh_hk":"盲赂颅忙聳聡,猫聥卤忙聳聡"}
details.director_lang: {"en":"Jack Ng","zh_hk":"氓聬鲁莽聟聮氓聙芦"}
details.cast: Dayo Wong, Sammi Cheng, Louise Wong, Fish Liew, Yeung Wai Lun, Lo Chun Yip, Ho Kai Wa, Renci Yeung, Mandy Tam, Li Sum Ling, Hazel Lam, Tang Lai Ying
details.cast_lang: {"en":"Dayo Wong, Sammi Cheng, Louise Wong, Fish Liew, Yeung Wai Lun, Lo Chun Yip, Ho Kai Wa, Renci Yeung, Mandy Tam, Li Sum Ling, Hazel Lam, Tang Lai Ying","zh_hk":"茅禄聝氓颅聬猫聫炉茫聙聛茅聞颅莽搂聙忙聳聡茫聙聛莽聨聥盲赂鹿氓娄庐茫聙聛氓禄聳氓颅聬氓娄陇茫聙聛忙楼聤氓聛聣氓聙芦茫聙聛莽聸搂茅聨庐忙楼颅茫聙聛盲陆聲氓聲聼猫聫炉茫聙聛忙楼聤氓聛虏忙鲁鲁茫聙聛猫颅職忙聴禄猫聬卤茫聙聛忙聺聨猫聤炉茅搂聳茫聙聛忙聻聴莽聠聶氓陆陇茫聙聛茅聞搂茅潞聴猫聥卤"}

details.name: Night King 3.21 Special Screening
details.name_lang: {"en":"Night King 3.21 Special Screening","zh_hk":"茫聙聤氓陇聹莽聨聥茫聙聥3.21 忙颅隆氓聯楼V氓搂聬氓赂露茅職聤猫卢聺莽楼篓氓聽麓"}
details.title: Night King 3.21 Special Screening
details.title_lang: {"en":"Night King 3.21 Special Screening","zh_hk":"茫聙聤氓陇聹莽聨聥茫聙聥3.21 忙颅隆氓聯楼V氓搂聬氓赂露茅職聤猫卢聺莽楼篓氓聽麓"}
details.description:
The year is 2012. The once-glamourous Club EJ suddenly experiences a hostile takeover. Much like the nightclub industry, the glory days are over for the club芒聙聶s manager, Foon (Dayo Wong), despite having stood tall in East Tsim Sha Tsui for decades.

To make things worse for Foon, the club芒聙聶s new CEO is none other than his cutthroat ex-wife, Madame V (Sammi Cheng)! Determined to change things up, she leaves Foon and his hostesses with no choice but to transform and modernize in order to breathe new life into their business. Little do they know, a powerful conglomerate has been pulling the strings all along to shut down Club EJ for good.

To save their neon empire, Foon and V must join forces and make an epic last stand with the hostesses against what seems to be inevitable doom.
details.subtitle: Chinese,English
details.subtitle_lang: {"en":"Chinese,English","zh_hk":"盲赂颅忙聳聡,猫聥卤忙聳聡"}
details.director_lang: {"en":"Jack Ng","zh_hk":"氓聬鲁莽聟聮氓聙芦"}
details.cast: Dayo Wong, Sammi Cheng, Louise Wong, Fish Liew, Yeung Wai Lun, Lo Chun Yip, Ho Kai Wa, Renci Yeung, Mandy Tam, Li Sum Ling, Hazel Lam, Tang Lai Ying
details.cast_lang: {"en":"Dayo Wong, Sammi Cheng, Louise Wong, Fish Liew, Yeung Wai Lun, Lo Chun Yip, Ho Kai Wa, Renci Yeung, Mandy Tam, Li Sum Ling, Hazel Lam, Tang Lai Ying","zh_hk":"茅禄聝氓颅聬猫聫炉茫聙聛茅聞颅莽搂聙忙聳聡茫聙聛莽聨聥盲赂鹿氓娄庐茫聙聛氓禄聳氓颅聬氓娄陇茫聙聛忙楼聤氓聛聣氓聙芦茫聙聛莽聸搂茅聨庐忙楼颅茫聙聛盲陆聲氓聲聼猫聫炉茫聙聛忙楼聤氓聛虏忙鲁鲁茫聙聛猫颅職忙聴禄猫聬卤茫聙聛忙聺聨猫聤炉茅搂聳茫聙聛忙聻聴莽聠聶氓陆陇茫聙聛茅聞搂茅潞聴猫聥卤"}

details.description:
Germany / 2024 
 

In early-2000s eastern Germany, brothers Philipp (12) and Tobias (9) watch their family slowly break apart while building an unfinished house. Unemployment, silence, and old wounds leave the boys alone in vast fields and clear quarry waters that offer brief freedom. Nature feels endless, but real guidance is scarce. Older youths draw Philipp in with promises of belonging芒聙聰yet their path carries violence and fear of outsiders. As a refugee shelter is planned nearby, quiet tensions turn sharp. A clear-eyed, tender portrait of youth caught between loss, nature, and the hard search for a place to stand.

details.description:
Germany / 2024 
 

In the heart of rural East Germany, a remarkably preserved skeleton surfaces from the moor, sparking fevered village guesses: a Wehrmacht deserter, a farmer who defied collectivization, or the shadowy third man from a long-ago intelligence operation? Laura Laabs芒聙聶 striking debut transforms this discovery into a quietly gripping historical puzzle, where echoes of the entire twentieth century suddenly flicker into the present. Tine, at first detached, soon finds the weight of buried eras pressing inescapably into her own life. Atmospheric, introspective and subtly unnerving, the film reveals how history never truly stays underground.

details.description:
East Germany / 1973 
 

In 1970s East Berlin, single mother Paula and unhappily married functionary Paul keep missing each other in the same streets 芒聙聰 until a chance encounter in a smoky bar sparks an intense, life-changing romance. Paula, fierce in her pursuit of joy, refuses to settle; Paul, torn between duty and desire, hesitates before finally embracing the depth of what they share. Heiner Carow芒聙聶s DEFA classic pulses with groovy energy, bold fashion, and irresistible music that launched the Puhdys to stardom. A warm, rebellious celebration of personal happiness against socialist conformity, this cult phenomenon became a defiant anthem for individual freedom 芒聙聰 nearly too subversive for its time.

details.description:
Germany / 2014
 

In the shadow of German reunification, the eastern city of Rostock simmers with frustration and lost hope. More than three thousand stand by as a mob besieges the Sonnenblumenhaus, home to over 120 Vietnamese migrant workers and their families, and set it ablaze on the night of 24 August 1992. The film recounts the incident from the perspective of three very different characters, capturing the explosive collision of xenophobia, apathy, and fragile belonging in a newly united nation. Burhan Qurbani芒聙聶s urgent drama lays bare the human cost of fear and silence.

 

WINNER Best Supporting Actor, German Film Awards 2015
WINNER Best Screenplay, Bavarian Film Awards 2016

details.description:
Germany / 2024

 

In 1990, as East and West Germany rush towards reunification, Maren, Robert and their childhood friends stumble upon a startling secret: millions in soon-to-be-worthless East German marks hidden in an underground vault. With the current exchange deadline looming, they 芒聙聯 joined by neighbours and old comrades 芒聙聯 embark on a bold, chaotic plan to retrieve as much money as they can carry. The spirited heist comedy, inspired by real events, captures the dizzying hope and absurdity of those transitional days.

details.title: Love after Love(bcSunday)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Love after Love(bcSunday)","zh_hk":"莽卢卢盲赂聙莽聢聬茅娄聶(bcSunday)"}
details.description: Ge Weilong, a young girl from Shanghai, travels to Hong Kong in pursuit of her education. In order to pay for her studies, she asks her aunt, Mrs. Liang, for help. Mrs. Liang is leading a shady life, and Weilong gradually becomes her aunt芒聙聶s puppet in the game of luring the rich and powerful men. As it happens, Weilong gets genuinely attracted to playboy George Qiao, whose aim is to marry a wealthy girl to maintain his own high-end class lifestyle.

details.title: As the Water Flows
details.title_lang: {"en":"As the Water Flows","zh_hk":"莽驴聽忙鹿聳"}
details.description:
The debut feature from cinematographer Bian Zhuo won Best Film in the Asian New Talent Competition at the Shanghai International Film Festival. Bian also served as screenwriter, editor and director of photography for this elegiac drama about Xie Shuwen, an elderly widower who considers a new romance one year after the passing of his wife. However, his decision is fraught, sowing discontent among his grown children, complicating a web of family matters, and bringing to light past hardships. Facing emotional difficulties and uncooperative health, Xie strives to heal his family and himself before life's light fades.

 

Best Film Award, Asian New Talent Competition, Shanghai International Film Festival
Vancouver International Film Festival
New Talent Award, Hong Kong Asian Film Festival

details.description:
Quentin Tarantino芒聙聶s Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair unites Volume 1 and Volume 2 into a single, unrated epic芒聙聰presented exactly as he intended, complete with a new, never-before-seen anime sequence.


Uma Thurman stars as The Bride, left for dead after her former boss and lover Bill ambushes her wedding rehearsal, shooting her in the head and stealing her unborn child. To exact her vengeance, she must first hunt down the four remaining members of the Deadly Viper Assassination Squad before confronting Bill himself. With its operatic scope, relentless action, and iconic style, The Whole Bloody Affair stands as one of cinema芒聙聶s definitive revenge sagas芒聙聰rarely shown in its complete form, and now presented with a classic intermission.

details.description:
The intense friendship between two thirteen-year-old boys Leo and Remi suddenly gets disrupted. Struggling to understand what has happened, Leo approaches Sophie, Remi's mother. Close is a film about friendship and responsibility.
 

Winner of the Grand Prix at the 75th Cannes Film Festival, Lukas Dhont芒聙聶s follow-up to Girl went on to garner nominations for Academy Award for Best International Film and Golden Globe Award for Best Picture 芒聙聯 Non-English Language.

details.title: Sore: A Wife from the Future(AC2026)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Sore: A Wife from the Future(AC2026)","zh_hk":"茅聙聠忙聶聜氓聟聣忙聢聙盲潞潞(AC2026)"}
details.description: In Croatia, a struggling Indonesian photographer meets Sore, a woman claiming to be his future wife. Her mission is to transform Jonathan芒聙聶s life before it芒聙聶s too late. But when Sore reveals the secrets of the future, she begins to bleed and dies, only for time to reset. Will her attempts be enough to rewrite their future, or will time always win? Expanded from a hit web series, this sci-fi romance reflects on love and the price of change. A domestic box office hit and winner of four Citra Awards, it offers a poignant, unconventional take on the time-loop trope.

details.title: Goodbye, Dragon Inn(AC2026)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Goodbye, Dragon Inn(AC2026)","zh_hk":"盲赂聧忙聲拢(AC2026)"}
details.description: On a night of pouring rain in Taipei, the Fu-Ho Grand Theatre shuts its doors forever. As Dragon Inn glows on the gigantic screen, a young Japanese man seeks refuge. The swordsmen from the screen, now older, sit in the dark reminiscing and mourning. A crippled ticket clerk limps through labyrinth-like passageways, her footsteps echoing. The space appears void of life, yet other presences linger. Through static long takes, Tsai Ming-Liang gazes at the disappearance of cinema, paying tribute to a bygone era.

details.description:
The documentary film about the Korean indie band The Rose is set to exclusively hit the big screen in Broadway cinema!

 

The Rose: Come Back To Me is an intimate documentary showcasing the dramatic rise of The Rose, the Korean indie rock band with roots in the K-pop training system. After cultivating a millions-strong global fanbase, a label dispute forces them into a years-long hiatus. Now, they are back, with an electrifying tour芒聙聰and on their own terms.

details.title: Black Rabbit, White Rabbit(AC2026)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Black Rabbit, White Rabbit(AC2026)","zh_hk":"氓陇垄茅聛聤氓隆聰氓聬聣氓聟聥莽聣聡氓聽麓(AC2026)"}
details.description: In Tajikistan, while an Iranian director remakes a classic, the armorer grows paranoid upon discovering their gun is not a prop. Simultaneously, a young woman crashes the set for an audition, while elsewhere, Sara uncovers a conspiracy behind her car crash. These seemingly unrelated stories intertwine into a surreal mystery, blurring reality and dreams. With sophisticated extreme long takes, the film explores the nature of cinema: if every "Chekhov芒聙聶s Gun" points toward a final suspense, will it ultimately fire?
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

In Tajikistan, while an Iranian director remakes a classic, the armorer grows paranoid upon discovering their gun is not a prop. Simultaneously, a young woman crashes the set for an audition, while elsewhere, Sara uncovers a conspiracy behind her car crash. These seemingly unrelated stories intertwine into a surreal mystery, blurring reality and dreams. With sophisticated extreme long takes, the film explores the nature of cinema: if every \"Chekhov芒聙聶s Gun\" points toward a final suspense, will it ultimately fire?

Washed-up revolutionary Bob (DiCaprio) exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa (Infiniti). When his evil nemesis (Penn) resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

details.description:
Following the Academy Award-nominated sensation The Worst Person in the World, Joachim Trier reunites with Renate Reinsve for this Cannes Grand Jury Prize winner.
Nora Borg is an established Oslo stage actress; her younger sister Agnes is her closest companion. The two grew up together after their once-renowned filmmaker father Gustav left the family years earlier. When Gustav re-enters their lives and attempts to cast Nora in his comeback film, old wounds bleed anew. Nora rejects his offer, prompting Gustav to cast American star Rachel Kemp, who gradually comes to realize she has unwittingly become part of a deeply personal film drama. Agnes, meanwhile, delves deeper into the family history as Gustav and Nora attempt rapprochement, revealing a past that threatens the fragile foundations of the family.

 

One-hour post-screening talk by Wong Kim Fan, lecturer at the Chinese University of Hong Kong, conducted in Cantonese.

details.description: Kam Tin is home to people of many ethnicities, like a miniature United Nations. Chris moves there from the city with his wife Erica and their daughter, Wing Yan. As they adjust to their new life, they must also learn how to get along with neighbors of different ethnicities. Chris starts a business with an Indian partner, though Erica has little faith in it. Wing Yan befriends an African asylum seeker, sparking gossip. Haunted by unpleasant past experiences, Erica carries racial stereotypes, growing increasingly anxious and unsettled as tensions rise芒聙娄This film is funded by the Hong Kong Arts Development Council.

details.description:
When courage becomes the fuel芒聙娄 revenge is unstoppable.

 

Hamza Ali Mazari, whose real identity is Jaskirat Singh Rangi, pursues his undercover operation within Pakistan's criminal world while tracking down Majo.
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

When courage becomes the fuel芒聙娄 revenge is unstoppable.

 

Hamza Ali Mazari, whose real identity is Jaskirat Singh Rangi, pursues his undercover operation within Pakistan's criminal world while tracking down Majo. 

","zh_hk":"

茅聹聡忙聮录氓聟篓莽聬聝茂录聦2025氓鹿麓氓聧掳氓潞娄忙聹聙猫鲁拢氓潞搂茅聸禄氓陆卤茫聙聤Dhurandhar茫聙聥芒聙聰 莽潞聦茅聸聠茅聣聟莽聧禄茫聙聤Dhurandhar茂录職The Revenge茫聙聥莽路聤猫虏录氓聧掳氓潞娄忙聵聽忙聹聼莽聶禄茅聶赂茅娄聶忙赂炉氓陇搂茅聤聙氓鹿聲茂录聛

 

氓禄露莽潞聦氓聣聧盲陆聹茅漏職氓驴聝氓聥聲茅颅聞莽職聞猫芦聹忙聢掳茅聶掳猫卢聙茂录聦忙聹卢茅聸聠忙聲聟盲潞聥氓聟篓茅聺垄氓聧聡莽麓職茂录聦盲赂聙氓聽麓忙漏芦猫路篓氓聹聥莽聲聦莽職聞猫芦聹忙聢掳茅垄篓忙職麓氓聟篓茅聺垄氓录聲莽聢聠茂录聛猫聡楼氓潞聲莽聣鹿氓路楼 Jaskirat Singh Rangi忙陆聸氓聟楼氓路麓氓聼潞忙聳炉氓聺娄莽陆陋忙聝隆莽碌聞莽鹿聰忙聽赂氓驴聝茂录聦猫陋聯猫娄聛猫驴陆忙聧聲氓庐驴忙聲碌茫聙聦Majo茫聙聧茂录聦氓卤聲茅聳聥盲赂聙氓聽麓猫路篓猫露聤氓聹聥莽聲聦莽職聞氓戮漏盲禄聡猫隆聦氓聥聲茫聙聜

 

莽聲露盲驴隆氓驴碌猫垄芦猫聝聦氓聫聸茫聙聛莽聹聼莽聸赂猫垄芦忙聫颅茅聳聥茂录聦莽聠卤猫隆聙莽聡聝莽聡聮忙聢聬盲赂聧忙禄聟莽職聞忙聙聮莽聛芦 芒聙聰 氓聥聡忙掳拢氓掳聡氓聦聳莽聜潞氓戮漏盲禄聡莽職聞氓聤聸茅聡聫茂录聛

details.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

","zh_hk":"

details.name: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
details.name_lang: {"en":"Portrait of a Lady on Fire","zh_hk":"忙碌麓莽聛芦莽職聞氓掳聭氓楼鲁莽聲芦氓聝聫"}
details.title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
details.title_lang: {"en":"Portrait of a Lady on Fire","zh_hk":"忙碌麓莽聛芦莽職聞氓掳聭氓楼鲁莽聲芦氓聝聫"}
details.description:
Set in 18th century France, Marianne, a young painter, is commissioned to paint a wedding portrait of a young noblewoman and reluctant bride to be, He脤聛loi脤聢se. Knowing that He脤聛loi脤聢se has just come out of a convent and has previously refused to sit for portraits, Marianne disguises herself as the lady芒聙聶s companion by day in order to paint her portrait from memory by night.

 

Intimacy and attraction grow between the two women, they ignite in each other feelings that are passionate yet forbidden. As they share He脤聛loi脤聢se芒聙聶s first and last moments of freedom, all whilst Marianne paints the portrait that will end it all. Drawing on the story of Orpheus and Eurydice, director Ce脤聛line Sciamma flips the male gaze in Hitchcock芒聙聶s Vertigo and presents a film that is based entirely on the female gaze: a gaze of artistic appropriation, of inquisition, and of unstoppable desires.
details.subtitle: Chinese,English

details.cast: Ad脙篓le Haenel, No脙漏mie Merlant, Valeria Golino

details.description: The school that cultivates future police officers is known as the "Kyojo." Here, unqualified students will be eliminated. The 205th class of police academy students, who harbour dreams, hopes, and secrets, will face the strict instructor Kimichika Kazama, who can see through any lies. At the same time, Kazama's former students, along with his past subordinate Koji Yanagisawa, are investigating the true culprit who took Kazama's right eye...

At the same time, Kazama's former students, along with his past subordinate Koji Yanagisawa, are investigating the true culprit who took Kazama's right eye...

details.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

","zh_hk":"

details.title: CIAO UFO
details.title_lang: {"en":"CIAO UFO","zh_hk":"氓聠聧猫娄聥UFO"}
details.description: Wah Fu Estate in Aberdeen is the home of many urban legends, but few were as outlandish as the one that happened in the 1980s: One night, residents turned their heads to the sky and saw a giant UFO hovering above them for five minutes. No one else could prove or explain the odd phenomenon, but it becomes the pivotal event for three young people in this long-awaited return to form for director Patrick Leung (La Brassiere, Simply Actors). This charming sci-fi comedy also marks the reunion of Tsui Tien-you, Wong Younam and Charlene Choi, who co-starred in 2002 teen comedy hit Summer Breeze of Love.
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

Wah Fu Estate in Aberdeen is the home of many urban legends, but few were as outlandish as the one that happened in the 1980s: One night, residents turned their heads to the sky and saw a giant UFO hovering above them for five minutes. No one else could prove or explain the odd phenomenon, but it becomes the pivotal event for three young people in this long-awaited return to form for director Patrick Leung (La Brassiere, Simply Actors). This charming sci-fi comedy also marks the reunion of Tsui Tien-you, Wong Younam and Charlene Choi, who co-starred in 2002 teen comedy hit Summer Breeze of Love.

details.description: Shiori, an ordinary high school student, dreams day and night of becoming viral on social media. One day, a crack appears on her smartphone screen and a virtual 芒聙聹SHIORI芒聙聺 made of data is born. This new-born 芒聙聹SHIORI芒聙聺 not only upending her world but also replacing her real life. Trapped in the digital world, Shiori is powerless to save herself, watching helplessly as her imposter transforms into a vibrant idol and internet celebrity. In this digital Labyrinth, Shiori encounters a mysterious rabbit guy named 芒聙聹Komori,芒聙聺 who guides her escape this bizarre and algorithm-constructed digital maze. Before herself is completely digitized and forgotten, she must find her way home芒聙娄

details.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction芒聙娄 but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

details.description: After the leader芒聙聶s death, successors Soon-tae and Kang-pyo show zero interest in power. Soon-tae dreams of franchise offers for his restaurant Mimi Lu, while Kang-pyo aspires to be a tango dancer. As the clan panics, only the impulsive Pan-ho is scheming to become the boss. A hilarious competition begins where everyone tries to lose in the boss election. Adapted from Once a Gangster, this film parodies triad stereotypes and subverts traditional gangland ambition. In this absurd era, who would actually want to be the boss?

details.description:
Set in 18th century France, Marianne, a young painter, is commissioned to paint a wedding portrait of a young noblewoman and reluctant bride to be, He脤聛loi脤聢se. Knowing that He脤聛loi脤聢se has just come out of a convent and has previously refused to sit for portraits, Marianne disguises herself as the lady芒聙聶s companion by day in order to paint her portrait from memory by night.

 

Intimacy and attraction grow between the two women, they ignite in each other feelings that are passionate yet forbidden. As they share He脤聛loi脤聢se芒聙聶s first and last moments of freedom, all whilst Marianne paints the portrait that will end it all. Drawing on the story of Orpheus and Eurydice, director Ce脤聛line Sciamma flips the male gaze in Hitchcock芒聙聶s Vertigo and presents a film that is based entirely on the female gaze: a gaze of artistic appropriation, of inquisition, and of unstoppable desires.

 

Each ticket includes an A3 international and French poster.

details.description:
What if you could communicate with all kinds of animals and become a part of the animal world?


From the creators that brought you Inside Out and Toy Story, Disney and Pixar芒聙聶s all-new animated comedy adventure 芒聙聹Hoppers芒聙聺 introduces Mabel, an animal lover who seizes an opportunity to use a new technology to 芒聙聵hop芒聙聶 her consciousness into a life-like robotic beaver and communicate directly with animals, uncovering mysteries beyond anything she could have imagined.

details.title: HAMNET
details.title_lang: {"en":"HAMNET","zh_hk":"氓聯聢氓搂聠氓掳录莽聣鹿"}
details.description: 1580 England. Impoverished Latin tutor William Shakespeare meets free-spirited Agnes, and the pair, captivated by one another, strike up a torrid affair that leads to marriage and three children. Yet as Will pursues a budding theater career in far-away London, Agnes anchors the domestic sphere alone. When tragedy strikes, the couple芒聙聶s once-unshakable bond is tested, but their shared experience sets the stage for the creation of Shakespeare芒聙聶s timeless masterpiece, Hamlet. From Focus Features and Academy Award脗庐 winning filmmaker Chlo脙漏 Zhao (Nomadland, The Rider) comes a sensitively observed, magnificently crafted tale about the complexities of love and the healing power of art and creativity.
details.subtitle: Chinese
details.director_lang: {"en":"Chlo脙漏 Zhao","zh_hk":"猫露聶氓漏路"}

details.description:
What if you could communicate with all kinds of animals and become a part of the animal world?


From the creators that brought you Inside Out and Toy Story, Disney and Pixar芒聙聶s all-new animated comedy adventure 芒聙聹Hoppers芒聙聺 introduces Mabel, an animal lover who seizes an opportunity to use a new technology to 芒聙聵hop芒聙聶 her consciousness into a life-like robotic beaver and communicate directly with animals, uncovering mysteries beyond anything she could have imagined.

details.title: GAMER GIRLS
details.title_lang: {"en":"GAMER GIRLS","zh_hk":"茅聸禄莽芦露氓楼鲁氓颅漏"}
details.description: When the all-girls professional esports team disbands, former captain Summer ventures into the corporate world after graduation. Unable to shake her passion for competitive gaming, she forms "Gamer Girls", an amateur all-female team that transforms local Cha Chaan Teng into gaming venues. Just as they gain popularity, gaming companies shut down their events citing copyright violations. With Hong Kong esports team selections looming, these determined players must fight to restore their competition rights. Directors Veronica Bassetto and Sophie Yang deliver an energetic youth esports tale, where winning or losing matters less than fighting side by side to forge an ideal world.
details.description_lang:
{"en":"

When the all-girls professional esports team disbands, former captain Summer ventures into the corporate world after graduation. Unable to shake her passion for competitive gaming, she forms \"Gamer Girls\", an amateur all-female team that transforms local Cha Chaan Teng into gaming venues. Just as they gain popularity, gaming companies shut down their events citing copyright violations. With Hong Kong esports team selections looming, these determined players must fight to restore their competition rights. Directors Veronica Bassetto and Sophie Yang deliver an energetic youth esports tale, where winning or losing matters less than fighting side by side to forge an ideal world.

details.description:
Quentin Tarantino芒聙聶s Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair unites Volume 1 and Volume 2 into a single, unrated epic芒聙聰presented exactly as he intended, complete with a new, never-before-seen anime sequence.


Uma Thurman stars as The Bride, left for dead after her former boss and lover Bill ambushes her wedding rehearsal, shooting her in the head and stealing her unborn child. To exact her vengeance, she must first hunt down the four remaining members of the Deadly Viper Assassination Squad before confronting Bill himself. With its operatic scope, relentless action, and iconic style, The Whole Bloody Affair stands as one of cinema芒聙聶s definitive revenge sagas芒聙聰rarely shown in its complete form, and now presented with a classic intermission.

details.description:
Quentin Tarantino芒聙聶s Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair unites Volume 1 and Volume 2 into a single, unrated epic芒聙聰presented exactly as he intended, complete with a new, never-before-seen anime sequence.


Uma Thurman stars as The Bride, left for dead after her former boss and lover Bill ambushes her wedding rehearsal, shooting her in the head and stealing her unborn child. To exact her vengeance, she must first hunt down the four remaining members of the Deadly Viper Assassination Squad before confronting Bill himself. With its operatic scope, relentless action, and iconic style, The Whole Bloody Affair stands as one of cinema芒聙聶s definitive revenge sagas芒聙聰rarely shown in its complete form, and now presented with a classic intermission.

details.description: In 1917, Lionel芒聙聰a young, talented music student芒聙聰meets David at the Boston Conservatory, where they bond over a deep love of folk music. Years later, Lionel receives a letter from David, leading to an impromptu journey through the backwoods of Maine to collect traditional songs. This unexpected reunion, ensuing love affair, and the music they collect and preserve, will shape the course of Lionel芒聙聶s life far beyond his own awareness.

details.description: Set in modern-day Tokyo, an American actor (Brendan Fraser) who struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese "rental family" agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients芒聙聶 worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality. Confronting the moral complexities of his work, he rediscovers purpose, belonging, and the quiet beauty of human connection.

details.description: As the birthday song plays, a baby girl is born inside a women芒聙聶s prison, welcomed by four inmates, each burdened by a painful past. When a rebellious newcomer arrives, clashes give way to friendship. After the baby is diagnosed with an eye disease, the inmates form a prison choir to gift the baby girl a final memory. Drawing from real-life stories, director Gavin Lin's heartfelt drama blends humour, music, and redemption.

details.name_lang: {"en":"ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS (2026)","zh_hk":"ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS (2026)"}
details.title: ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS (2026)
details.title_lang: {"en":"ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS (2026)","zh_hk":"ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS (2026)"}
details.description:
Experience ENHYPEN WORLD TOUR 芒聙聵WALK THE LINE芒聙聶 IN JAPAN 芒聙聯 SUMMER EDITION on the big screen!


From their very first meeting to the global stage they command today, ENHYPEN芒聙聶s journey is one of growth, unity, and connection. Rising to million-seller status within a year, achieving a record-breaking Tokyo Dome debut, earning their first grand prize in 2025, and delivering a headline-making performance at Coachella, the group芒聙聶s success has been shaped by the powerful bond they share with ENGENEs.


This concert film captures that bond in full: electrifying live performances, the intensity of rehearsals, candid moments behind the scenes, and the everyday lives of the members as they travel through Japan in the heat of summer. More than a concert, it is a celebration of connection, a line that continues to extend forward, carrying ENHYPEN and ENGENEs toward the future, together.


Experience it all in deeply immersive 2D & 4DX screens at Broadway Cinemas !

details.description: Three years ago, Ben (Alex Fong) led a botched raid that resulted in the death of his undercover agent, Bong. Now serving as sergeant of a patrol car, Ben insists on doing everything by the book. When Bong's younger brother, Wallace (Carlos Chan), joins Ben's unit, the two men clash over their differing methods. Meanwhile, the robbers who killed Bong lurk in the shadows, waiting to avenge their fallen brother.

details.description: Tim Kao, the meticulous head chef of a five-star hotel in Taiwan, is set to marry his Hong Kong fianc脙漏e Daisy Wu. But Tim芒聙聶s divorced parents refuse to attend the same ceremony, and each insists on hosting their own. To complicate things further, the Feng Shui master chooses the same auspicious date for both events. Tim, Daisy, their wedding planner Regina, and the best man Tsai must orchestrate two weddings simultaneously in the same hotel, without either parent finding out. Surrounded by a strict father, a demanding mother, and a cast of sharp-tongued relatives, Tim must confront the traumas of his upbringing and ask himself: is he truly ready to start a new family of his own?

He芒聙聶s planning his biggest ever score 芒聙聰 hoping it芒聙聶ll be his last 芒聙聰 when his path collides with Sharon (Halle Berry), a disillusioned insurance executive whom he芒聙聶s forced to work with, and Orman (Barry Keoghan), a rival thief with far more disturbing methods than Davis's. As the multi-million dollar heist approaches, relentless detective Lt. Lubesnik (Mark Ruffalo) closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher, and the line between hunter and hunted starts to blur. details.description: Julie is turning thirty and her life is an existential mess. Several of her talents have gone to waste and her older boyfriend, Aksel 芒聙聯 a successful graphic novelist 芒聙聯 is pushing for them to settle down. One night, she gatecrashes a party and meets the young and charming Eivind. Before long, she has broken up with Aksel and thrown herself into yet another new relationship, hoping for a new perspective on her life. But she will come to realize that some life choices are already behind her.

details.title_lang: {"en":"The Snowball On A Sunny Day","zh_hk":"茅聡聭氓陇職氓炉露"}
details.description:
Kam Muiday (Elaine JIN) has long been asking her granddaughter Sunnie Lam (CHUNG Suet Ying) to buy the same set of lucky numbers in each Mark Six lottery ticket for years. However, fate played a cruel trick. During the Lunar New Year芒聙聶s "Snowball Draws", Sunnie was unable to place the bet, and that set of lucky numbers won a jackpot of HK$ 88.88 million.

 

Not wanting to shatter grandmother's dream, Sunnie borrowed a villa from her filming colleague Jay Lai (Edan LUI), claiming that it was purchased with the winnings. Sunnie's father, Ken Lam (Jiro LEE), mother Charlotte Tong (Harriet YEUNG), and younger brother Harry Lam (LI Hoi Lam Marek), moved into the villa with her grandmother. Living together under one roof gradually healed their once-distant relationships and brought them closer. However, an unexpected incident ultimately revealed this well-intentioned "villa lie"...

details.description:
From Warner Bros. Pictures and Academy Award- and BAFTA-winning filmmaker Emerald Fennell comes 芒聙聹WUTHERING HEIGHTS,芒聙聺 starring Academy Award and BAFTA nominee Margot Robbie opposite BAFTA nominee Jacob Elordi.
 
A bold and original imagining of one of the greatest love stories of all time, Emerald Fennell芒聙聶s 芒聙聹WUTHERING HEIGHTS芒聙聺 stars Margot Robbie as Cathy and Jacob Elordi as Heathcliff, whose forbidden passion for one another turns from romantic to intoxicating in an epic tale of lust, love and madness.

details.title_lang: {"en":"Sentimental Value","zh_hk":"忙聝聟忙聞聼莽職聞氓聝鹿氓聙录"}
details.description:
Following the Academy Award-nominated sensation The Worst Person in the World, Joachim Trier reunites with Renate Reinsve for this Cannes Grand Jury Prize winner. 

Nora Borg is an established Oslo stage actress; her younger sister Agnes is her closest companion. The two grew up together after their once-renowned filmmaker father Gustav left the family years earlier. When Gustav re-enters their lives and attempts to cast Nora in his comeback film, old wounds bleed anew. Nora rejects his offer, prompting Gustav to cast American star Rachel Kemp, who gradually comes to realize she has unwittingly become part of a deeply personal film drama. Agnes, meanwhile, delves deeper into the family history as Gustav and Nora attempt rapprochement, revealing a past that threatens the fragile foundations of the family.

details.title: The World Of Love
details.title_lang: {"en":"The World Of Love","zh_hk":"猫聥楼氓聲聫盲赂聳莽聲聦猫陋掳莽聞隆氓聜路"}
details.description:
Enigmatic 17-year-old high school student Lee Joo-in is a cheerful friend, a shameless daughter, a mischievous girlfriend, and a person always hard to predict. One day, some words she says in a fit of anger cause a major scene. Afterwards, she receives anonymous notes questioning her behavior, and cracks begin to appear in her formerly peaceful world.

 

Will Jooin, who wanted nothing more than to protect her world, be able to go back to how things used to be?

details.title: Life is Climbing(bcDocs)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Life is Climbing(bcDocs)","zh_hk":"莽聞隆猫娄聳茅職陋氓鲁掳氓陇搂忙颅楼猫碌掳(bcDocs)"}
details.description: Life is climbing for blind paraclimbing legend Koichiro Kobayashi, who won gold at four consecutive Paraclimbing World Championships. At twenty-eight, a rare eye disease began to gradually fade his world to black. This extraordinary journey wouldn't have been possible without his sight guide and lifelong friend, Naoya Suzuki, his voice serves as both eyes and encouragement for Kobayashi. Tethered by twenty years of absolute trust, the duo embarks on their ultimate pilgrimage - the crumbling sandstone spires of Fisher Towers, Utah. Director Sokichi Nakahara芒聙聶s award-winning debut captures every exhilarating slip and grip, visceral exploration of the human spirit芒聙聶s power to overcome fear. After all, is the steepest precipice the mountain before us, or the darkness within?

details.description: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

details.title: Kokuho
details.title_lang: {"en":"Kokuho","zh_hk":"氓聹聥氓炉露"}
details.description: The world of Kabuki, the elaborately stylised, male Japanese theatrical tradition, is the setting for director Lee Sang-il芒聙聶s epic melodrama of artistic ambition, rivalry and betrayal. It is an adaptation of a bestseller by Shuichi Yoshida, and weaves in stunning stagings of classic Kabuki tales that wowed audiences at Cannes Directors芒聙聶 Fortnight. In 1960s Nagasaki, after the death of his yakuza father, gifted teenager Kikuo (Ryo Yoshizawa) is taken under the wing of famed Kabuki actor Hanjiro Hanai (Ken Watanabe), even though the great performer already has a son, Shunsuke (Ryusei Yokohama), who has dedicated his life to the art. Over fifty years, the relationship of the two disciples entwines and twists, and their hearts suffer as much yearning, glory and downfall as their on-stage alter-egos.

details.title: Farewell to my Concubine (4K Restored Version)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Farewell to my Concubine (4K Restored Version)","zh_hk":"茅聹赂莽聨聥氓聢楼氓搂卢 (4K盲驴庐氓戮漏莽聣聢)"}
details.description:
Douzi, a boy with feminine features, is abandoned by his prostitute mother to an all-boys Peking opera troupe supervised by Master Guan. Douzi befriends fellow trouper Shitou.

A few years later in 1938, a teenage Douzi is trained to play dan (female roles), while Shitou learns jing (painted face male roles). When practicing the play "Dreaming of the World Outside the Nunnery", Douzi intentionally mistakes the line "I am by nature a girl, not a boy" with "I am by nature a boy, not a girl," subjecting himself to severe physical punishments. Douzi along with another student, Laizi, attempt to run away, but Douzi decides to pursue acting seriously after witnessing an opera performance. Upon returning, they find the whole troupe being punished for their desertion, and Douzi is beaten. As a result, Laizi hangs himself...

details.description:
From Warner Bros. Pictures comes 芒聙聹One Battle After Another,芒聙聺 written, directed and produced by Paul Thomas Anderson and starring Academy Award and BAFTA winners Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio Del Toro, and Regina Hall, Teyana Taylor and Chase Infiniti.

Washed-up revolutionary Bob (DiCaprio) exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa (Infiniti). When his evil nemesis (Penn) resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

details.description:
Heat is a gripping crime thriller directed by Michael Mann, starring Academy Award脗庐 winners Al Pacino and Robert De Niro. Neil McCauley (Robert De Niro), a highly skilled and disciplined professional thief who leads a crew specializing in high-stakes heists across Los Angeles. On the other side is Vincent Hanna (Al Pacino), a relentless LAPD detective whose dedication to his job matches McCauley芒聙聶s commitment to his criminal craft.

As McCauley and his crew plan their biggest score yet, Hanna and his team close in, leading to an intense game of cat and mouse. Both men struggle to balance their personal lives with their professional obsessions, blurring the lines between hunter and hunted. The film builds to a climactic confrontation, exploring themes of loyalty, sacrifice, and the thin line separating lawmen from lawbreakers.

Renowned for its realistic action sequences, complex characters, and the legendary face-off between Pacino and De Niro, Heat is considered a landmark in the crime genre.

details.title_lang: {"en":"Yi Yi: A One and a Two (4K Restoration)","zh_hk":"盲赂聙盲赂聙茂录聢4K盲驴庐氓戮漏莽聣聢茂录聣"}
details.description: The extraordinary, internationally embraced Yi Yi: A One and a Two returns for its 25th anniversary with a 4K restoration. The story follows a middle-class family in Taipei over the course of one year, beginning with a wedding and ending with a funeral. Whether chronicling middle-age father NJ芒聙聶s tentative flirtations with an old flame or precocious young son Yang-Yang芒聙聶s attempts at capturing reality with his beloved camera, late Taiwanese auteur Edward Yang deftly imbues every gorgeous frame with a compassionate clarity. Warm, sprawling, and dazzling, this intimate epic is one of the undisputed masterworks of the new century. Winner of Best Director at the 2000 Cannes Film Festival, celebrated again at 2025芒聙聶s Cannes Classics.

details.description: The Grand Budapest Hotel recounts the adventures of legendary concierge Gustave H. and Zero Moustafa, the lobby boy who becomes his most trusted friend. The story involves the theft of a priceless painting; a raging battle for an enormous family fortune; and a desperate chase on motorcycles, trains, sleds, and skis - all against the back-drop of a suddenly and dramatically changing Continent.

details.title: Pulp Fiction (4K Restoration)
details.title_lang: {"en":"Pulp Fiction (4K Restoration)","zh_hk":"氓聧卤茅職陋盲潞潞莽聣漏 (4K盲驴庐氓戮漏莽聣聢)"}
details.description:
A stunning 4K restoration of this masterpiece will return to big screen celebrating its 30th anniversary. 

Jules Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marsellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an aging boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

details.description:
To celebrate the 25th Anniversary of one of the most celebrated musicals produced by the legendary Andrew Lloyd Webber, THE PHANTOM OF THE OPERA was recorded live at Royal Albert Hall for this screening version.

Deformed since birth, a bitter man known only as the Phantom lives in the sewers underneath the Paris Opera House. Falling in love with a young prot脙漏g脙漏e Christine, the Phantom privately tutors her while terrorizing the opera house and demanding Christine be given lead roles. Things get worse when Christine meets back up with her childhood acquaintance Raoul and the two fall in love. The Phantom is outraged by their love and kidnaps Christine to be his eternal bride. Raoul is now the only one who can stop him......

details.description:
Broadway Circuit will exclusively present PARIS OPERA BALLET 2026 on the big screen in cinemas. This season includes: 芒聙聹Giselle芒聙聺, 芒聙聹The Nutcracker芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹Le Parc芒聙聺.

 

In a French-style garden, four modern Cupids set the pace for romantic conquests. People seek each other out, flirt, observe each other, desire each other, refuse each other, but pride eventually gives way, releasing passions that have been repressed for too long.

Broadway Circuit will exclusively present PARIS OPERA BALLET 2026 on the big screen in cinemas. This season includes: 芒聙聹Giselle芒聙聺, 芒聙聹The Nutcracker芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹Le Parc芒聙聺.


One Christmas Eve, young Clara is given an inanimate puppet, a nutcracker. Holding it in her arms, she falls asleep and dreams of a fantasy world where toys come to life. Surrounded by toy soldiers, rats, and oversized dolls, and guided by the Nutcracker now Prince, Clara confronts her desires and fears.

details.description: After years of anticipation, a truly unmissable event arrives in cinemas as the electrifying Lise Davidsen tackles one of the ultimate roles for dramatic soprano: the Irish princess Isolde in Wagner芒聙聶s transcendent meditation on love and death. Heroic tenor Michael Spyres stars opposite Davidsen as the love-drunk Tristan. The momentous occasion also marks the advent of a new, Met-debut staging by Yuval Sharon芒聙聰hailed by The New York Times as 芒聙聹the most visionary opera director of his generation芒聙聺 and the first American to direct an opera at the famed Wagner festival in Bayreuth芒聙聰as well as Music Director Yannick N脙漏zet-S脙漏guin芒聙聶s first time leading Tristan und Isolde at the Met. Mezzo-soprano Ekaterina Gubanova reprises her portrayal of Brang脙陇ne, alongside bass-baritone Tomasz Konieczny, who sings Kurwenal after celebrated Met appearances in Wagner芒聙聶s Der Fliegende Holl脙陇nder and Ring cycle. Bass-baritone Ryan Speedo Green makes an important role debut as King Marke.

Baritone Igor Golovatenko reprises his portrayal of the urbane Onegin, who realizes his affection for her all too late. The Met芒聙聶s evocative production, directed by Tony Award芒聙聯winner Deborah Warner, 芒聙聹offers a beautifully detailed reading of 芒聙娄 Tchaikovsky芒聙聶s lyrical romance芒聙聺 (The Telegraph).

details.description: For gorgeous melody, spellbinding coloratura, and virtuoso vocal fireworks, I Puritani has few equals. The first new Met production of Bellini芒聙聶s final masterpiece in nearly 50 years芒聙聰a striking staging by Charles Edwards, who makes his company directorial debut after many successes as a set designer芒聙聰arrives in cinemas worldwide. The Met has assembled a world-beating quartet of stars, conducted by Marco Armiliato, for the demanding principal roles. Soprano Lisette Oropesa and tenor Lawrence Brownlee are Elvira and Arturo, brought together by love and torn apart by the political rifts of the English Civil War, with baritone Ricardo Jos脙漏 Rivera as Riccardo, betrothed to Elvira against her will, and bass-baritone Christian Van Horn as Elvira芒聙聶s sympathetic uncle, Giorgio.

details.description: Following triumphant Live in HD performances in Gounod芒聙聶s Rom脙漏o et Juliette, Verdi芒聙聶s La Traviata, and Donizetti芒聙聶s Lucia di Lammermoor, Nadine Sierra summits another peak of the soprano repertoire as Amina, who sleepwalks her way into audiences芒聙聶 hearts in Bellini芒聙聶s poignant tale of love lost and found. In his new production, Rolando Villaz脙鲁n芒聙聰the tenor who has embarked on a brilliant second career as a director芒聙聰retains the opera芒聙聶s original setting in the Swiss Alps but uses its somnambulant plot to explore the emotional and psychological valleys of the mind. Tenor Xabier Anduaga co-stars as Amina芒聙聶s fianc脙漏, Elvino, alongside soprano Sydney Mancasola as her rival, Lisa, and bass Alexander Vinogradov as Count Rodolfo. Riccardo Frizza takes the podium for one of opera芒聙聶s most ravishing works.

details.description:
Austria, Germany / 2020

2020 
Encouters Award 芒聙聯 Special Jury Prize, Berlinale

2021
Best Film, Best Cinematography, German Film Critics Association Awards

2021
Best Feature Film, Best Director, Best Makeup, Austrian Film Award

In the near future, ten-year-old android Elli drifts through shifting identities, built to embody memories, desires, and losses that are not her own. Programmed as the perfect child, she moves like a ghost between families, becoming at once a vessel for longing and a mirror of hidden fears and forbidden intimacy. With unsettling atmosphere and hypnotic precision, Sandra Wollner芒聙聶s provocative second feature blurs the boundaries between memory and code, family and fabrication, offering a haunting meditation on loneliness, desire, and the uncanny ways we seek to keep the past alive.
